data.raceName: ALL THE NEWS AT TRACKSIDE.CO.NZ PBD
data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. PORTLAND KRUGER has not raced since scoring (21.65) over 375m at this track three-and-a-half months ago. Has a good record here at this journey. Did have a solo trial (19.18) at Manukau over 318m. Has the ability and looks a key chance this line-up. 6. LOVE IT comes off an average effort last start when fifth at this track over 375m behind Iris Haze (21.85) in a Class 3. Leading chance. 5. OPAWA RAISIN showed little early speed at her last couple, the latest finishing fifth (21.89) in a Class 3 at this track. Form at the trip sound including two wins. Has ability and is one of the better chances. 7. WAERENGA RITCHIE meets a field with several chances but can sneak into the finish.","runners":[3,6,5,7],"exclusive":false}
